title: Process Engineer Vacancy at MRF - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at MRF - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? MRF in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MRF:
MRF is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MRF!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
